entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop [Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br.] whose West and Central African genetic resources were characterized for agro-morphological traits and Striga resistance

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region from which the pearl millet genetic resources and accessions originated

entities.name: AGRO-MORPHOLOGICAL CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating the physical and agricultural characteristics of pearl millet accessions

entities.name: PEARL MILLET REFERENCE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of pearl millet accessions established by the Generation Challenge Program and ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which helped establish the reference collection and provides the seeds

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet accessions to resist infestation by the parasitic weed Striga hermonthica

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that affects pearl millet crops

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country where pearl millet accessions were evaluated for Striga resistance

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: A country where field trials for agro-morphological characterization were conducted

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country where field trials for agro-morphological characterization were conducted

entities.name: LONG PANICLES
entities.description: A specific agro-morphological trait of interest identified in several pearl millet accessions

entities.name: HIGH-GRAIN DENSITY
entities.description: A specific agro-morphological trait of interest identified in several pearl millet accessions

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: A specific agro-morphological trait of interest identified in several pearl millet accessions

entities.name: STABLE YIELDING
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet accessions to maintain yield across different environments

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which was found to be inferior in Genebank accessions compared to checks

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to reveal diversity and admixture among the tested pearl millet accessions

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: The experimental method used to characterize accessions under various conditions

entities.name: LOW-INPUT CONDITIONS
entities.description: A field trial environment with minimal external inputs

entities.name: FERTILIZED CONDITIONS
entities.description: A field trial environment where fertilizers were applied

entities.name: INBREEDING DEPRESSION
entities.description: A potential cause for the observed yield inferiority in Genebank accessions due to small effective population size

entities.name: LOST ADAPTATION
entities.description: A potential cause for the observed yield inferiority in Genebank accessions

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The wide range of genetic and morphological variation observed among the pearl millet accessions

entities.name: ADMIXTURE
entities.description: The mixing of genetic lineages observed among the tested pearl millet accessions
